questions.q: What does USCIS send before the naturalization interview?
options: An interview notice with date, place, and documents to bring
questions.explanation: The notice tells you when and where to appear and what to bring.

questions.q: What do you do first when the officer greets you?
options: Take an oath to tell the truth
questions.explanation: You swear to tell the truth before the interview begins.

questions.q: On the 2025 civics test (128 questions), how many questions are asked and how many must you answer correctly?
questions.explanation: The 2025 version asks up to 20 and needs 12 correct; the 2008 version asks 10 and needs 6.

questions.q: Which is a possible outcome of the interview?
questions.explanation: Cases are approved, continued for more information, or denied.

questions.q: What completes the process after approval?
questions.explanation: The oath ceremony makes citizenship official.
